CVE-2022-25647.title: The package com.google.code.gson:gson before 2.8.9 are vulnerable ...
CVE-2022-25647.description: The package com.google.code.gson:gson before 2.8.9 are vulnerable to Deserialization of Untrusted Data via the writeReplace() method in internal classes, which may lead to DoS attacks.

CVE-2025-53864.title: Connect2id Nimbus JOSE + JWT 10.0.x before 10.0.2 and 9.37.x befo ...
CVE-2025-53864.description: Connect2id Nimbus JOSE + JWT 10.0.x before 10.0.2 and 9.37.x before 9.37.4 allows a remote attacker to cause a denial of service via a deeply nested JSON object supplied in a JWT claim set, because of uncontrolled recursion. NOTE: this is independent of the Gson 2.11.0 issue because the Connect2id product could have checked the JSON object nesting depth, regardless of what limits (if any) were imposed by Gson.
